title: move files between files column and files gallery
excerpt: alternatively, be able to attach files from the files gallery to emails!

posts.author: Dimity (Dimity Hyde)
posts.cookedHtml: alternatively, be able to attach files from the files gallery to emails!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dimity,

In the Files gallery, you can configure the settings so that files sync between the two locations:

Screen Shot 2023-08-03 at 1.39.15 pm2762×1244 199 KB

Is this what you’re referring to?

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I had the same issue today. But it doesn’t seem to sync. I don’t see the files from the files gallery in the files column. Which means, I cannot add them to an email with Emails & Activities.

In my opinion, Emails & Activities should have an option to upload from the Files tab instead of from the Files column. Not saying the files column should not exist, but in for use with Emails & Activities, it is in my opinion a redundant column.

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Dimity,

You can use EasyMails app, you can use drag and drop template designer, easily upload files directly from your board column, and seamlessly integrate your board data into your email content.
It’s like having Mailchimp inside monday .com

Screenshot 2024-04-13 at 4.00.45 PM1446×831 113 KB

posts.author: Ben_psi (Ben Liu)
posts.cookedHtml: I just discovered that the file uploaded to the gallery can not be upload to file column. There should be an added option for file gallery amount all the other options that they put on there. You shouldn’t need a 3rd party app to accomplish this.
